title: iris caucasica subsp. nezahatiae
intro: Iris caucasica subsp. nezahatiae is a rare, endemic subspecies of the iris flower that originates from Turkey. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which are derived from its iridoid glycosides. The health benefits of this plant include relief from colds, fever, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wound healing and pain relief. Iris caucasica subsp. nezahatiae can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
